title: The Swamp Priest Appears
description: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Nami, Zoro. Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Yeah, but that was just a snack!

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: Sky Island's lunches are tasty, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It had come up into the sky.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Of course not!! You idiotic bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That we read in Norland's diary!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ... then something about the South Bird...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: The things he wrote before he died.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: with the ancient map of Skypica.

summary: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
